title: If I Had To Start Over From $0..Here's How I'd Become A Millionaire Again As A Beginner
description: In this video, Sandeep breaks down exactly what you need to understand about money, inflation, and the market. Whether you're just getting started or want to protect what you've already built, he walks through how to invest your first $10k, the best accounts to grow your wealth, and how to navigate stocks, bonds, index funds, and more. If you've been waiting for a sign to take control of your finances — this is it.
